title: chromolaena laevigata var. arenaria
intro: Chromolaena laevigata var. arenaria, also known as a variant of the tropical shrub Chromolaena laevigata, is a plant species used in traditional medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chromolaena laevigata var. arenaria include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support wound healing and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional folk medicine.
